Name: Warby Parker
Description: Warby Parker designs and sells prescription eyeglasses and sunglasses online and in retail stores. Known for try-at-home program and social mission.

Name: Allbirds
Description: Allbirds makes sustainable footwear from natural materials like merino wool and eucalyptus. Focuses on carbon-neutral products.

Name: Glossier
Description: Glossier is a beauty brand born from the blog Into The Gloss. Sells skincare and makeup with a community-first approach.

Name: Chewy
Description: Chewy is an online retailer of pet food and products. Known for exceptional customer service and auto-ship subscriptions.

Name: ThirdLove
Description: ThirdLove is a lingerie company using data-driven fit technology. Offers half-cup sizes based on millions of body measurements.

Name: Casper
Description: Casper is a sleep company selling mattresses pillows and bedding direct to consumer. Pioneered the bed-in-a-box model.

Name: Bombas
Description: Bombas makes comfort-focused socks underwear and t-shirts. Donates an item for every item purchased.

Name: Away
Description: Away is a travel brand selling luggage and accessories. Known for sleek design and built-in phone chargers.

Name: Hims & Hers
Description: Hims & Hers is a telehealth company offering treatments for hair loss skincare ED and mental health.

Name: Rent the Runway
Description: Rent the Runway lets customers rent designer clothing and accessories via subscription. Pioneered fashion rental model.
